chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-1485 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.6529/2025 (U/A 2. For orders on CMA No.5806/2025 (U/A) 3. For orders on CMA No.5807/2025 (Ex/A) 4. For hearing of main case 30.09.2025 ************** 1. None present for the petitioner nor any intimation received. Accordingly, the urgency application is disposed of. 2. Dismissed being infructuous. 3. Granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4. Through present petition, petitioner seeks appointment on the basis of disability in accordance with law. The record reflects that disability certificates annexed as Annexures A and A-1 are not in accordance with the law. Accordingly, the petitioner is directed to obtain a fresh disability certificate from the Committee constituted in 2019 under the Sindh Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities Act, 2018, and thereafter approach the respondents for appointment against the disability quota. The present petition, being not maintainable, stands dismissed in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
